title: ornithogalum comosum var. contortum
intro: Ornithogalum comosum var. contortum, commonly known as the twisted-flower star-grass or contorted star grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ornithogalum comosum var. contortum include its potential to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and skin irritations due to its antiseptic and antispasmodic properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a treatment for specific health conditions.
